sections.title: Technique
sections.default: PA and oblique views of the {laterality} hand were obtained.

sections.title: Findings
sections.normal_text: The metacarpal and phalangeal bones appear intact. No fracture or dislocation is identified. The interphalangeal and metacarpophalangeal joint spaces are maintained. No periarticular soft tissue swelling or calcification is identified.

sections.title: Impression
sections.normal_text: No fracture or significant bony abnormality of the {laterality} hand.

few_shot_normal.input: hand bones intact, no fracture, joints normal

output.findings: The metacarpal and phalangeal bones appear intact. No fracture or dislocation is identified. The interphalangeal and metacarpophalangeal joint spaces are maintained. No periarticular soft tissue swelling.
output.impression: No fracture or significant bony abnormality of the hand.
